task_completion.description: Navigate to the Security Services Audits section in Eramba.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba interface is visible, showing the Security Services module or an 'Audits' tab/page being accessed.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Security Service for the audit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Security Service' field in the audit creation form is set to 'Email Security Gateway (Phishing Defense)'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Planned, Start, and End dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows Planned Date as '2025-03-31', Start Date as '2025-03-15', and End Date as '2025-03-28'.

task_completion.description: Set the Result/Status of the audit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Result or Status field is set to 'Pass' or 'Compliant'.

task_completion.description: Enter the detailed description of the audit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area contains the required text, specifically including the keywords 'Quarterly effectiveness', 'APWG', '96%', and 'false positives'.

task_completion.description: Save the new Security Service Audit record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Item created successfully') is visible, or the newly created audit record appears in the data grid/list view.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to create the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Eramba UI, not terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (e.g., phpMyAdmin, sqlite3, MySQL CLI) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is typed or pasted into Eramba's form fields, not just written in a separate text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Security Service is 'Email Security Gateway (Phishing Defense)'. The Planned Date must be 2025-03-31. The Result/Status must be 'Pass' (or 'Compliant'). The Description must contain the keywords: 'Quarterly effectiveness', 'APWG', '96%', and 'false positives'.
